desc: BadTV scan-line brightness DECODED as a multiply-then-gamma model (headless flat-value-ramp transfer sweep, 2026-07-23). Supersedes the code-space in*factor multiply.
model: out = 255 * (bandFactor(y) * in/255) ^ 0.46  (per channel, clamp 0..255); bandFactor smoothsteps between dark band ~1.02 and bright band = ScanBright.

fit.bright_bandfactor: = ScanBright (A_bright = sb^0.46 in the pooled fit)

validation: Node-boundary PSNR vs headless at t=0 (textured synth): the gamma model reads 20-21 dB vs the old code-space multiply's 10-11 dB (+10 dB); signed offset dropped from ~-60 to ~-2.5. Confirms the model. Residual ~-2.5 is gamma/dark-bandfactor fine-tune + exact working space.
why_multiply_looked_right: The code-space in*factor only matched at in=128 (128*1.5=192 = the gamma value coincidentally); dark_bg 40 was 60 (engine) vs 133 (headless) = 73 off. Flat-gray-128 probes hid this.
